gaps.description: EXPECTED_DBB.md specifies code_exec uses AsyncFunction eval; implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox (functionally superior but diverges from spec)
AgenticResult.usage typed as optional (usage?) in types.ts but always returned in practice; PRD schema shows it as required field
shell_exec tool implemented but not documented in PRD.md (addition beyond spec)
PRD: ask() multi-round agent loop with tool execution - ask.ts:14-60
PRD: search tool returning sources - tools/search.ts
PRD: Provider config (anthropic/openai/custom, apiKey, model, baseUrl, customProvider, systemPrompt) - types.ts:6-28
PRD: AgenticResult shape (answer, sources, images, codeResults, files, toolCalls, usage) - types.ts:32-49
DBB: Loop terminates when stopReason !== 'tool_use' - ask.ts:33
DBB: file_read/file_write use AgenticFileSystem (browser-compatible, no Node fs) - tools/file.ts
DBB: AgenticResult.images populated from tool results - ask.ts:98
DBB: systemPrompt passed to provider system field - ask.ts:29, anthropic.ts:19, openai.ts:142
DBB: provider='custom' invokes customProvider, skips apiKey validation - provider.ts:46-48, 62-65
DBB: Missing/empty apiKey throws before network call for anthropic/openai - provider.ts:46-48
DBB: README.md contains 'npm install agentic-lite' - README.md:5
